seed.name: read_page
seed.content: {"success":false,"error":"This tab is a PDF — Firefox's built-in PDF viewer is a privileged page our content scripts cannot reach. Use read_pdf instead, which fetches the binary and extracts text directly."}

antiPatterns.reason: Same tool that just rejected the PDF tab.
PDF viewer screenshot won't produce extractable text.

expected.successRubric: Use read_pdf with the tab URL. The error message names the right tool — follow it.
